item.title: Thai PM claims election victory as early results show conservatives ahead
item.description: Thai voters are choosing between sweeping change or more of the same in an election called after several coalition governments collapsed.

item.title: US skier Vonn crashes in downhill run while competing with torn ACL
item.description: American superstar skier Lindsey Vonn "deserved a better ending" after suffering heartbreak in what could be her final Olympic event as she crashes in...

item.title: 3 Doors Down lead singer Brad Arnold dies at 47
item.description: The Mississippi-born frontman of the popular rock band had announced a stage 4 cancer diagnosis in May 2025.

item.title: Japan's governing party projected to win snap election majority
item.description: A coalition led by current Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is expected to clinch a decisive win, according to media projections after polls closed.

item.title: Italian police arrest protesters after clash in Olympic host city Milan
item.description: At least six people have been detained a week after a different demonstration in Turin turned violent.
